code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(cur)
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let count = nums.len()
mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut running = 0
mut j = 0
while j < count
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      running = v
    else
      if v > running
        running = v
      end
    end
    maxes = list.push(maxes, running)
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < count
  match maxes.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
